creator: anders@FreeBSD.org
text:
When starting Apache ActiveMQ 4.1.1 (see http://activemq.apache.org/), I get this error message:

#

# An unexpected error has been detected by HotSpot Virtual Machine:

#

#  SIGSEGV (0xb) at pc=0x0000000804c73697, pid=24591, tid=0x2eb19570

#

# Java VM: Java HotSpot(TM) 64-Bit Server VM (1.5.0_14-p8-root_17_feb_2008_14_35 mixed mode)

# Problematic frame:

# 

[error occurred during error reporting, step 60, id 0xb]



# An error report file with more information is saved as hs_err_pid24591.log

#

# If you would like to submit a bug report, please write

# a letter to freebsd-java@FreeBSD.org mailing list

The file hs_err_pid24591.log contains:
